scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit:run && npm run test:integration:run && node scripts/run-acceptance-tests.mjs && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:electron && npm run test:unit:run
scripts.test:unit:run: node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/unit/config-service.test.mjs test/unit/file-service.test.mjs test/unit/icon-paths.test.mjs test/unit/operation-log-client.test.mjs test/unit/operation-log-service.test.mjs test/unit/single-instance.test.mjs test/unit/sync-service.test.mjs test/unit/tray-service.test.mjs
scripts.test:unit:coverage: npm run build:electron && node --experimental-test-coverage --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-coverage-lines=80 --test-coverage-functions=80 --test-coverage-branches=80 --test-coverage-include=dist-electron/services/ConfigService.js --test-coverage-include=dist-electron/services/FileService.js --test-coverage-include=dist-electron/services/OperationLogService.js --test-coverage-include=dist-electron/services/SyncService.js test/unit/config-service.test.mjs test/unit/file-service.test.mjs test/unit/icon-paths.test.mjs test/unit/operation-log-client.test.mjs test/unit/operation-log-service.test.mjs test/unit/single-instance.test.mjs test/unit/sync-service.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:electron && npm run test:integration:run
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.electron:dist:portable: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win --x64 --dir && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win portable --x64 --prepackaged release/win-unpacked --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.electron:dist:nsis: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win nsis --x64
